title: rubus beirensis
intro: Rubus beirensis is a species of raspberry native to the mountainous regions of Taiwan, known for its unique and highly medicinal properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, fever, and inflammation, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rubus beirensis include reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Rubus beirensis can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
